title: Teleport Master Simplified
description: This mod adds some commands for teleporting, but commands are simplified!
body:
This mod is an unofficial fork of Teleport Master, it simplifies some commands and is suitable for players who like Original Mod but don't like complex commands.
Usage: /tpm [ ...].

/tpm a - accept the teleport request you just received..

/tpm d - deny the teleport request you just received.

/tpm w [ []] - randomly teleport you blocks away (disable to accept positions in water).

/tpm r [ a | i ] - create a teleport request that you ask if you can teleport where is, or you invite to come to where you are.

/tpm spawn - teleport to shared spawn point.

/tpm sethome [] - set your current location as your home .

/tpm home [] - teleport to your home .

/tpm b - teleport back to your last death point.

/tpm remove home [] - remove your home .

/tpm de b - remove your last death point.

/tpm help - show help information.
